scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tighter leading-tight text-foreground
scales.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-snug text-foreground
scales.overline: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-primary

spacing_and_layout.hero_layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 lg:gap-8 items-center min-h-[90vh] pt-32 pb-20

surface_strategies.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border/50 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.cards: bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-2xl shadow-soft hover:shadow-soft-lg transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden relative
surface_strategies.glass_panel: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 rounded-2xl shadow-soft
surface_strategies.input: bg-muted/50 border-transparent rounded-xl focus:bg-card focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/10 transition-all

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: framer-motion viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-12 px-8 py-3 text-base font-semibold shadow-sm hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-transparent text-foreground h-12 px-8 py-3 text-base font-medium border border-border hover:bg-muted/50 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.accent: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-accent text-accent-foreground h-12 px-8 py-3 text-base font-semibold shadow-sm hover:bg-accent/90 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5

components.auth_integration: Unified Auth Modal via Shadcn Dialog. No separate login page. Present a seamless tabbed or sliding interface for Login / Sign Up, styled premium. Include an explicit 'Try Demo (Guest Mode)' option in the auth flow.

images.description: Group of diverse people studying together in warm light. Use as the main hero image, potentially masked with rounded-2xl or layered with floating UI elements.
People collaborating at a table. Use for the 'Join existing groups' feature card inside a bento grid.
Abstract warm sage background texture. Use sparingly as a subtle background layer or within decorative bento grids.
User avatar for social proof or testimonial.
User avatar for social proof or testimonial.
User avatar for social proof or testimonial.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a high-converting, premium landing page for 'The Room' using React, Tailwind, and Framer Motion.
Navigation: Create a sticky header with backdrop-blur-xl and the brand logo. Do not hide desktop links behind a hamburger.

Hero Section: Split layout (Grid). Left side text (H1, Subtitle, Primary CTA, Try Demo CTA). Right side: Immersive visual using the 'hero_visual' image with floating UI elements (e.g., glassmorphism cards showing 'Group Joined' or 'New Lesson').

Feature Section: Implement a 'Bento Grid' strategy. Mix wide, square, and tall cards (col-span-8, col-span-4). Emphasize features: Host Courses, Join Groups, Collaborate. Use 'feature_collaboration' image in one of the tall cards.

Authentication Integration: Build a custom Shadcn Dialog for Auth. Make it unified—users can switch between Login and Register inside the modal. Add a clear 'Try Demo' button inside the modal and on the hero that acts as a read-only guest login.
Social Proof: Add a section with overlapping avatars (flex -space-x-4) and a star rating to build trust.
Styling Constraints: Apply generous padding (`py-24`, `py-32`) to sections to create breathing room. Do not use generic Inter font or generic blue gradients.
Testing: Add `data-testid` attributes to all buttons, navigation links, and auth inputs.
